description: MCTS-TD Planner hooks — auto-cleanup old versions on session start

hooks.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const cache=path.join(require('os').homedir(),'.claude/plugins/cache/mcts-td-planner/mcts-td-planner');if(!fs.existsSync(cache))process.exit(0);const dirs=fs.readdirSync(cache).filter(d=>/^\d+\.\d+\.\d+$/.test(d)).sort((a,b)=>{const[a1,a2,a3]=a.split('.').map(Number);const[b1,b2,b3]=b.split('.').map(Number);return b1-a1||b2-a2||b3-a3});const latest=dirs[0];for(const d of dirs.slice(1)){const p=path.join(cache,d);fs.rmSync(p,{recursive:true,force:true});console.log('[MCTS-TD] Cleaned old version:',d)}if(dirs.length>1)console.log('[MCTS-TD] Keeping latest:',latest)"
